step_by_step_thinking: \boxed{A} Based on the retrieved medical evidence, sotatercept demonstrated efficacy in reducing pulmonary vascular resistance (PVR) and improving exercise tolerance (as measured by 6-minute walk distance) in a 24-week multicenter trial involving 106 patients with pulmonary arterial hypertension (PAH) receiving standard therapy. Additionally, sotatercept was associated with reductions in BNP levels, indicating improved cardiovascular function, although there were notable adverse events such as thrombocytopenia and one case of fatal cardiac arrest. Therefore, the available data support its effectiveness as a disease-modifying therapy for PAH.
raw_response:
\boxed{A} Based on the retrieved medical evidence, sotatercept demonstrated efficacy in reducing pulmonary vascular resistance (PVR) and improving exercise tolerance (as measured by 6-minute walk distance) in a 24-week multicenter trial involving 106 patients with pulmonary arterial hypertension (PAH) receiving standard therapy. Additionally, sotatercept was associated with reductions in BNP levels, indicating improved cardiovascular function, although there were notable adverse events such as thrombocytopenia and one case of fatal cardiac arrest. Therefore, the available data support its effectiveness as a disease-modifying therapy for PAH.
\boxed{A}
